strengths: Nearly 20 years of engineering experience with deep distributed-systems credentials — low-latency microservices handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic, plus a self-built event-driven, Kubernetes-deployed geo-data platform he has run as founder since 2016.

Current hands-on agentic-AI infrastructure work at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and frameworks supporting agentic workflows — directly aligned with the role's agentic-framework and tool-augmented-agent architecture needs.

Meaningful fintech and commercial-stakes exposure: investment-platform engineering at RIDE Capital with rigorous craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and multi-country pricing-strategy systems at Optilyz, complemented by a strong record of mentoring and technical teaching (workshops, courses, refactoring dojos).
concerns: Career trajectory is senior/staff individual contributor; no formal executive titles or documented experience scaling an engineering organization from 10 to 30+ people.
Agentic-AI experience is recent (April 2025) and tooling-oriented rather than demonstrated production operation of multi-agent systems with direct financial consequences.
No stated experience governing outsourced/hybrid engineering delivery models or communicating technical roadmaps to boards and executive leadership.

key_factors.factor: Production distributed-systems and event-driven architecture depth
Hands-on agentic-AI infrastructure and MCP tooling experience
Fintech domain exposure with disciplined engineering practices
No demonstrated executive-level team scaling or board communication

response.justification: This candidate offers an unusually strong technical foundation for the role's hardest requirements: he has built and operated genuinely high-scale, low-latency, event-driven backend systems in production, founded and sustained a real event-driven platform for nearly a decade, and is currently working hands-on in agentic-AI infrastructure — the exact architectural territory the role centers on. His fintech exposure at RIDE Capital and pricing-systems work at Optilyz, combined with a demonstrated culture of testing rigor, CI/CD discipline, and knowledge-sharing through workshops and courses, maps well onto the role's emphasis on production reliability, evaluation rigor, and developing others. Read favorably, he is a deeply experienced, polyglot systems builder whose recent agentic-AI work positions him to architect the multi-agent framework this company needs, with the leadership dimension representing upside to be probed rather than a disqualifier.
